# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept: this source should enter the institute as a serious research artifact candidate.

## Why

The source is an arXiv preprint and the excerpt explicitly reports empirical results, including a Resolve@1 score of 54.3% on SWE-Bench-Pro, plus evaluation on SWE-Bench-Verified, SWE-Bench-Pro, and a custom PyTorch-Bench with ablations and error analyses. That clears the admission bar for real experimental substance rather than commentary or theorycraft.

## Limits
